records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's one thing to accept an outsider from another world so easily, but you also look forward to working with me?
records.m_Talk_TWN: It's one thing to accept an outsider from another world so easily, but you also look forward to working with me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's one thing to accept an outsider from another world so easily, but you also look forward to working with me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's one thing to accept an outsider from another world so easily, but you also look forward to working with me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're a strange one. Don't you have any suspicions about me?
records.m_Talk_TWN: You're a strange one. Don't you have any suspicions about me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're a strange one. Don't you have any suspicions about me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're a strange one. Don't you have any suspicions about me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In a situation like this when there is no one to guard you, overpowering you would be a simple task.
records.m_Talk_TWN: In a situation like this when there is no one to guard you, overpowering you would be a simple task.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In a situation like this when there is no one to guard you, overpowering you would be a simple task.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In a situation like this when there is no one to guard you, overpowering you would be a simple task.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I would expect you to make more rational decisions as a leader.
records.m_Talk_TWN: I would expect you to make more rational decisions as a leader.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I would expect you to make more rational decisions as a leader.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I would expect you to make more rational decisions as a leader.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I believe we haven't built enough trust for you to say you believe in me.
records.m_Talk_TWN: I believe we haven't built enough trust for you to say you believe in me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I believe we haven't built enough trust for you to say you believe in me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I believe we haven't built enough trust for you to say you believe in me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But that kind of nosiness isn't bad. That unwavering look of yours reminds me of someone I know.
records.m_Talk_TWN: But that kind of nosiness isn't bad. That unwavering look of yours reminds me of someone I know.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But that kind of nosiness isn't bad. That unwavering look of yours reminds me of someone I know.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But that kind of nosiness isn't bad. That unwavering look of yours reminds me of someone I know.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right. At least you're a Human worthy of respect.
records.m_Talk_TWN: All right. At least you're a Human worthy of respect.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right. At least you're a Human worthy of respect.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right. At least you're a Human worthy of respect.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Our little talk might have gotten a little sidetracked, but... I will repay you for your kindness.
records.m_Talk_TWN: Our little talk might have gotten a little sidetracked, but... I will repay you for your kindness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Our little talk might have gotten a little sidetracked, but... I will repay you for your kindness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Our little talk might have gotten a little sidetracked, but... I will repay you for your kindness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll prove to you that your choice wasn't wrong.
records.m_Talk_TWN: I'll prove to you that your choice wasn't wrong.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll prove to you that your choice wasn't wrong.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll prove to you that your choice wasn't wrong.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that this encounter is also not a mistake.
records.m_Talk_TWN: And that this encounter is also not a mistake.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that this encounter is also not a mistake.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that this encounter is also not a mistake.
